intended_use: Rayvolve PTX-PE is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes chest x-ray images (Postero-Anterior (PA) or Antero-Posterior (AP)) of patients of 18 years of age or
intended_use_full: Rayvolve PTX-PE is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software that analyzes chest x-ray images (Postero-Anterior (PA) or Antero-Posterior (AP)) of patients of 18 years of age or older for the presence of pre-specified suspected critical findings (pleural effusion and/or pneumothorax).
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; interpreted from concurrent read methodology on radiographs with defined positive/negative cases (50% positive, ±5%)
other_metrics: Performance time - Pneumothorax: 19.43 seconds (95% CI: 19.42-19.45); Pleural Effusion: 19.56 seconds (95% CI: 19.49-19.58). High performance maintained across subgroups: age, gender, ethnicity, device projection views, patient position (upright/supine), institutions, and additional conditions.
